text:
On Tue, 20 Feb 2007 14:00:57 -0500
Rick Chisholm <rchisholm@southlandonline.com> wrote:

> just finished installing the ICA client and wfcmgr does seem to fail
> to launch.  This is with 6.2-RELEASE and up-to-date ports tree. 
> ./wfcmgr launches a little Citrix splash box, but nothing ever
> happens.
> 
> Rick

At least, someone else with this error! Thanks:-)

I still have this problem, on my primary server almost every time and
both my laptop and workstation do this from time to time!
